holdings.infoBox: MDY is an equity ETF with a total of 401 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 1.48%, Carpenter Technology at 0.81%, Curtiss-Wright at 0.81%, Twilio at 0.80%, and U.S. Dollar at 0.79%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P MIDCAP 400 ETF Trust (MDY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of mid-cap US companies. MDY was launched on May 4, 1995 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: Major S&P Indices Set for a Rejig: Here’s What to Know
data.text: Top S&P Dow Jones indices, including the S&P 500 (SPX), the S&P MidCap 400 (MDY), and the S&P SmallCap 600 (RWJ), are set for a major reshuffle later this month.

data.title: 7 Great Growth ETFs to Get Your Portfolio Going
data.text: These growth ETFs provide exposure to the higher-risk investing style while mitigating some of the headaches associated with it.

data.title: The Technical Indicator: Charting a rabbit-from-hat rally, S&P 500 spikes from major support
data.text: Technically speaking, the S&P 500 has staged a bullish reversal from major support, writes Michael Ashbaugh, though the rally attempt’s durability remains an open question.

data.title: Look Under The Hood: The SPDR S&P MIDCAP 400 ETF Has 10% Upside
data.text: For the SPDR S&P MIDCAP 400 ETF, we found that the implied analyst target price for the ETF based upon its underlying holdings is $388.05 per unit.

data.text: For the SPDR S&P MIDCAP 400 ETF, we found that the implied analyst target price for the ETF based upon its underlying holdings is $388.74 per unit.

data.title: The Technical Indicator: Bull trend strengthens, S&P 500 presses uncharted territory ahead of G-20
data.text: Technically speaking, the U.S. benchmarks’ June price action remains comfortably bullish ahead of key meetings at this week’s G-20 summit.

data.title: The Technical Indicator: Bull trend under siege: S&P 500 ventures under near-term support
data.text: Technically speaking, notable S&P 500 support is under siege to start May, placing the near-term trend in question, writes Michael Ashbaugh.

data.title: The Technical Indicator: S&P 500’s grinding-higher bull trend approaches seasonal headwind
data.text: Technically speaking, the U.S. benchmarks are approaching the worst six months seasonally — May through October — against a still comfortably bullish backdrop, writes Michael Ashbaugh.

data.title: The Technical Indicator: Charting the S&P 500’s slow-motion approach of record territory
data.text: Technically speaking, the S&P 500 has reached less-charted territory at six-month highs, rising within striking distance of its record close, writes Michael Ashbaugh.
